---
title: "RSS / newsletter test post"
description: "Temporary stub to verify blog.xml and Buttondown; safe to delete after testing."
date: "2026-04-05"
categories: [meta]
---

This is a **throwaway post** used to confirm that a new URL appears in the site feed (`blog.xml`) and that your newsletter RSS automation can pick up a new item.

When you are finished testing, delete the folder `posts/rss-test-stub/`, run `quarto render`, and commit.
